textByHash.a8bf3041f9781f3479b09f6552f321da1b92dc5c: Greetings, stranger. How can I help you?
textByHash.ad4353c38b60c096a6e73fe71cb8ce2b2cc5a7fa: It's a cave filled with araxytes, a rare form of arachnid. I've been here researching them for some time.
textByHash.350d37bbbafdb2a6b795013c100fb1524af74a93: My niece, Nieve, is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. I also look after this cave for people on assignments like that.
textByHash.b55584983fe301d39a4313eb8aa62a3097b367bb: My nephew, Steve, is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. I also look after this cave for people on assignments like that.
textByHash.7a0281d8ae5e3b5b6d3db1063d20a14aeff77acb: However, the araxytes here are rather venomous... and when I say venomous, I mean venomous.
textByHash.12c5ad8dae4530d6757ccd8e407a6639fc043290: Well, I didn't think so by itself, but lots of other people seem to find it very interesting.
textByHash.2b7f1c4274177a3165bb6082c9331a0773fcb5d6: For example, there were some particularly pale wanderers doing their own research in here. They didn't bother me though.
textByHash.a079f82470a69c96de95c93e403197641b0fd32f: Oh wow, can I see it?.
textByHash.73254628e51207ee9b39422b87d6f63b8b0e5787: That is really fascinating. Thank you for sharing that with me.
textByHash.ae42ac11113abd0dbe8e4540feccee42a68acfeb: Next I'll need to find something a little more potent to progress my research...
textByHash.01089a8dc16872b4df0d9da6576ce4b826066c93: No that's quite alright, I've nothing else to learn from that particular sample. I need to find something else to progress my research...
textByHash.796828221c7fca5bb19ed38c080a0910eaff7d2a: Bad! Don't touch these unless you have a Slayer task to kill them.
